user.title: Mesh Solar
user.description: Configure your Mesh Solar API connection.

data_description.home_assistant_installation_id: Read-only identifier for this Home Assistant installation. Copy this value when registering licensing or trials.
data_description.battery_capacity_sensor: Entity ID that provides current battery capacity.
data_description.hash: Deterministic result of the most recent forecast.
data_description.registration_data: Registration data for your site. Used to avoid constant database reloads. Refreshes daily or when force-refreshed by the clear registration button.
data_description.forecast_device_id: Optional canonical device ID for app trial binding. Victron/Home Assistant setups usually use the GX device ID.
data_description.forecast_device_token: Optional portal-generated trial device token. Sent only as X-Mesh-Device-Token.
